description_long: This is a heavily armored combat tactical vehicle resembling a World War II-era tank, featuring a long-barreled main cannon mounted on a rotating turret. The exterior is covered in slat armor cages, particularly around the sides and rear, providing additional protection against anti-tank weapons. The hull and turret are painted in a desert camouflage pattern with irregular tan, brown, and light yellow stripes, and the vehicle displays various stowage items such as tarps and crates. The front and sides are reinforced with thick, angled armor plates, and the tracks are visible beneath the armored skirts. Distinctive markings, including a skull emblem and white symbols, are present on the front and sides. The vehicle is equipped with multiple hatches, periscopes, and antennae, indicating its operational and crewed nature.
description: A heavily armored tank with slat armor, desert camouflage, and a long-barreled cannon, featuring stowage and military markings. The vehicle is robust, with reinforced plating and visible tracks.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the tank, slat armor on the sides, turret details, and stowage items.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the thick frontal armor, main cannon, and visible military markings including a skull emblem.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar slat armor, turret, and additional stowage, as well as the long barrel extending outward.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back slat armor, engine deck, and rear stowage compartments.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One main cannon mounted on the turret; possible secondary machine gun mount on the turret roof.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped steel armor; additional slat armor cages on sides and rear; reinforced frontal plates.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Desert camouflage with tan, brown, and yellow irregular stripes.
attribute_military_markings: White skull emblem and symbols on the front and sides; additional white markings on the turret.
